titleStmt.title: SII 14.21: original edition by A. S. Ramanatha Ayyar
No. 21. (A.R. No. 37 of 1930. 31.) TIRUKKŌḌIKĀVAL, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE TIRUKKŌṬĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The record stated to be a copy of another inscription made during some repairs in the temple states that Varaguṇa-Mahārājar endowed 180 kaḻañju of gold for burning from the interest thereon three perpetual lamps before the images of Śrī Sarasvatī and Gaṇapati in the temple at Tirukkōḍikā alias Kaṇṇamaṅgalam. The existence of an auxiliary shrine for the goddess Sarasvatī at this early period is of interest. The regnal year in this inscription appears to be some numeral, of which the first digit is 1, but there appears to be some mistake in the copy.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīThe inscription is built at the right end.. Ituvu moru paṭi . komāṟaṉ caṭaiyaṟkku yāṇṭu 10
ṟṟūr nāṭṭut tirukkoṭikāvil śrī sarasvatigaṇapatikaḷukku muṉṟu nontāviḷakkerippataṟkku kuṭutta poṉ varakuṇamahārājar kuṭutta poṉ nūṟṟeṇpatiṉ kaḻañcu Ippoṉṉiṉ palicaiyāl nicati nā
yil Aḷantu kuṭuppomāṉom tirukkoṭikāvāṉa kaṇṇamaṅkalattu sabhaiyom . Itu paḻaṅkalpaṭi Inta śrīvimānattile Eṟaveṭṭiṉamaiyil muṉṉivājakamRead muṉṉivvācakamveṭṭikkiṭan=ta taṉik kallāl UbhaiyokamallāmaiyilRead upayokam
Itu muṭṭiṟ paṉmāyeśvarar kaṭaikkūṭṭap peṟṟār .
Digital edition of SII 14.21 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
